title: Mayflower Compact
description: A Wikisource source card for the Mayflower Compact and early colonial governance.

pages.text: The Mayflower Compact is a short primary source for studying self-government, community agreements, colonial settlement, and historical context.
Use this source for a brief close read, paraphrase practice, vocabulary support, and discussion of who was included or excluded from civic decisions.
This historical text is public domain, but check the Wikisource page for transcription and edition notes before mirroring classroom excerpts.
